$comment: Manifest mapping profiles to skills/hooks/templates, consumed by install.ps1 (--Profile) / install.sh (--profile). 'skills'/'hooks'/'templates' are SHIPPED — they MUST exist on disk; the installer treats a missing shipped item as a hard error (profiles.json out of sync with the repo, not a planned gap). 'plannedSkills'/'plannedHooks'/'plannedTemplates' are declared for roadmap visibility only, may legitimately not exist yet, and are reported as 'planned, not installed' without error.

defaults.note: If no --profile/-Profile is passed, the installer installs core + java-spring-backend.

core.description: Stack-agnostic SDD lifecycle, guardrails, and generic reviews. Always installed.

java-spring-backend.description: Java 17/21, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Maven (primary), REST APIs, JPA/Hibernate, Flyway, Keycloak/OAuth2, Vault. Default profile.
java-spring-backend.note: Phase 2 delivered 4 review skills, 2 defensive hooks (maven-compile shipped earlier), and 3 context templates. contract-testing-reviewer, observability-reviewer, openapi-contract-reminder, CONTRACT_TESTING.md, and OBSERVABILITY.md are Phase 3 candidates and are declared under the planned* arrays — the installer reports them as 'planned, not installed' and never errors on their absence.

messaging-event-driven.description: Kafka, RabbitMQ, ActiveMQ, event-driven architecture, outbox, saga, exactly-once/at-least-once semantics.
messaging-event-driven.note: Designed as overlay on java-spring-backend. Nothing is shipped yet — the entire profile is planned for Phase 3. Selecting it today installs core (+ the default profile, unless overridden) and reports every declared item as 'planned, not installed'.

payments-fintech.description: Payment processing, Stripe/PSP integration, idempotency, reconciliation, money/units safety, webhook signature verification.
payments-fintech.note: Overlay profile. Can combine with java-spring-backend or next-prisma-web. Nothing is shipped yet.

next-prisma-web.description: Next.js App Router, React, TypeScript, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Server Components/Actions, Tailwind.
next-prisma-web.note: Optional profile. The 4 shipped skills and 3 hooks are generic/stack-agnostic already present in the repo. prisma-migration-reviewer, nextjs-server-actions-reviewer, and prisma-migration-guard are planned.

blockchain-crypto.note: Placeholder. Nothing shipped or planned yet. disabled=true is enforced by the installer: requesting this profile explicitly via --profile/-Profile fails with a clear error rather than silently installing nothing. There is no flag to force-enable it — that requires an explicit code change plus a new spec.
